canonical_question: How do I generate landing page code — HTML/CSS/JS or React templates by industry, component library?
aliases: Build a landing page with Next.js and Tailwind CSS
Generate a conversion-optimized landing page from a template
Create a React landing page with shadcn/ui components
Landing page code generator — no-code vs hand-coded vs AI

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: v0 rebranded from v0.dev to v0.app in January 2026; Next.js 15 released with React 19 support; shadcn/ui v2 released

constraints: Core Web Vitals must pass: LCP < 2.5s, INP < 200ms, CLS < 0.1
Above-the-fold content drives 73% of conversion decisions — hero section must load in under 3 seconds on mobile
All images must have explicit width/height attributes to prevent CLS
A/B testing requires minimum 1,000 visitors per variant for statistical significance

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs a landing page strategy or content plan, not code
User needs to optimize an existing landing page for conversions
User needs a full marketing website with CMS, blog, and multiple pages

inputs_needed.question: What is the user's technical skill level?
What industry is the landing page for?

depends_on.label: Brand messaging and value proposition for headline copy

related_to.label: Full MVP architecture if page grows beyond a landing page
